competitions.title: Elimination
competitions.description: Twelve teams enter, one survives; daily team battles until a winner is crowned

events.title: Awareness Awareness Week
events.description: Increased awareness for one week (land hits more reliably)

events.title: Weekend Road Trip
events.description: Double racing points and racing skill

events.title: Valentine's Day
events.description: Love Juice reduces the energy cost of attacking and reviving

events.title: Employee Appreciation Day
events.description: Job points received tripled and gym training effects tripled

events.title: St Patrick's Day
events.description: Alcohol effects are doubled and Green Stout appears in the city

events.title: 420 Day
events.description: Cannabis effects are tripled

events.title: Museum Day
events.description: 10% bonus to museum point rewards

events.title: World Blood Donor Day
events.description: Life and cooldown penalties for drawing blood are halved

events.title: World Population Day
events.description: Level and weapon EXP gained while attacking is doubled

events.title: World Tiger Day
events.description: Hunting experience is increased by 5x

events.title: International Beer Day
events.description: Beer items are five times more effective

events.title: Tourism Day
events.description: Travel capacity doubled for flights leaving during the event

events.title: CaffeineCon 2026
events.description: Energy drink effects are doubled

events.title: Trick or Treat
events.description: Dress up and attack others to fill your basket with treats

events.title: World Diabetes Day
events.description: Candy effects are tripled

events.title: Black Friday
events.description: Torn's yearly dollar sale; many bazaars list goods for $1

events.title: Slash Wednesday
events.description: Hospital times reduced by 75%

events.title: Torn Anniversary
events.description: Torn's birthday (turns 22 in 2026)

events.title: Easter Egg Hunt
events.description: Easter eggs appear at random throughout Torn; collect and consume them for powerful effects

events.title: Christmas Town
events.description: Torn's festive theme park opens; explore maps for treasure and avoid traps
